ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the reported incident or issue */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the case */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the case */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case was opened */,
  "closed_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the case was closed (if applicable) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the case */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the case */,
  "last_updated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the case */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the incident occurred */,
  "affected_assets" TEXT /* Assets affected by the incident */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the case */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User or team the case is assigned to */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the case */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_severity_level FOREIGN KEY ("severity_level") REFERENCES case_severities ("severity_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES case_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the case (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case the history entry belongs to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., Updated, Resolved, Escalated) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action taken */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time taken to resolve the case in the history */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User or team the case was assigned to in the history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_history_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Analyst, Responder, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Summary of the reported incident or issue

Timestamp when the case was closed (if applicable)

Unique identifier for each history entry
ID of the case the history entry belongs to
Type of action taken (e.g., Updated, Resolved, Escalated)
ID of the user who took the action
Time taken to resolve the case in the history
User or team the case was assigned to in the history
Timestamp of the user's last login
Name of the role (e.g., Analyst, Responder, Admin)
